title: Awesome 3D Mace!
description: makes the broing 2D vanilla mace, into a 3D awesome version of it! improves the mace alot!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21972eb327a5028e162ca54394ee6a2e8ac5fd02.png)
## what is awesome 3D mace?
- Awesome 3D mace is a resource pack that improves the mace by making it 3D.



### common questions
<details>
<summary>do i need ETF/Optifine?</summary>

no you dont need ETF or optifine for this pack to work, its fully vanilla friendly.

</details>

 <summary>Mace Texture</summary>
